summary: A comfortable low-block 3-4-2-1 that gets the 10s 1v1 and overlaps the wing-backs to cross — excellent at the top end but with issues to fix.
style: 3-4-2-1 — play to get the wingers (10s) 1v1, overlapping FBs & WBs, crosses into the box, central block structure, comfortable low-block defending.

counterReliance.note: Comfortable low-block — can spring from deep

strengths: Crossing into the box and a strong top end of the pitch

keyPlayers.name: José Luis Rodríguez
keyPlayers.note: Goals, assists and creativity — excellent dribbler (64.6%) and a great crosser

tactics: Defend comfortably in a low-block, then get the 10s 1v1 and overlap to cross. A very hard group — they'll be up against the quality, but you just never know.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
